stemHtml: While briefing for an IFR approach, the pilot notices a maximum speed requirement on the reversal procedure. Exceeding the defined maximum speed might be hazardous, because he/she might NOT be able to comply with the required (1) _____, due to exceeding the expected (2) _____.

options.a: (1) bank angle; (2) rate of turn
options.b: (1) limits of the protected areas; (2) rate of turn
options.c: (1) limits of the protected areas; (2) radius of turn
